epic.priority: the steering epic for the next arc (bdo, chat, 2026-06-10) — pieces are wave-ordered; a wave does not open until the prior wave has a passing receipt (§9.3 lifted to epic scale). Amended same day on bdo's flip: story expression leads. His direction, rendered as intended (his standing rule, same day: write the intent, not the surface of his words): he is flipping the script — instead of AI doing work for him and submitting it for approval, he needs the AI to express its own experience, needs, and expectations in story form, to a high bar, drawn from the Pattern Commons — a governed shared definition of what this project means by a story, miles apart from a pattern that merely happens to be common; and until that capability exists, Claude holds determination capacity to get there. That grant is recorded here and in atom.story-commons.v0 so sessions inherit it from the record, not from chat. Namespace ruling, same message: the word 'real' is not added to new names (three pieces renamed in this amendment; the existing node_real admission type in loop/ predates the ruling and stands).
epic.arc: The substrate proved that a mortal process can be summoned into an authored place, watched, and judged — but every story on the log was hand-authored by a session in chat, and no machine gate has ever refused anything. What is missing is the experience layer: ambient events (a summons, surface drift, mock temperature, a records collision) reach sessions as injected context today, and nothing turns such an event into a launched, bounded experience on a specific surface that ends with the agent authoring its own story about what it lived. This epic wires the remaining requirements for a morphic agent — the same mortal process taking the shape of its place (D-9) and of its admitted backing (a summoned Claude session, a local model, or a deterministic rule) — to exist within a surface, process one experience under a granted expectation, and author a new story about it that must still survive the gates to the owner's stamp. Self-extension proposes; the owner admits (D-4).
epic.context: bdo's directive (chat, 2026-06-10, verbatim, spelling his): 'the experience layer is largely missing so we can from ambient events launch experienes into specific surfaces' and 'wire up the remianing requirements fro morphic agent existing as a mortal process within a surface given it's context to process an experience which results in a new story being authored by them about thier expericnes.' It answers the same-day witness review: zero machine refusals on the log ever; 12 of 20 done-lines shipped outside the atom pipeline; four parallel branches minted the same done-line id (0020) with no gate in the path; the only discriminating sensor is the owner. Trust boundary, on the record (bdo, same message): the capabilities that would let an agent touch ontum are NOT met — one ontum on disk needs the topos, the glyphs, and the language under it, so fabric-touch is out of this epic's remit; the ladder below is how that trust gets built rung by rung instead of asserted. Two OPEN pieces graduate here from epic.envoy-reception, as that epic anticipated ('may graduate'): the branded spawn rail and the model registry. The deterministic grant of context-and-expectation is the vault's prompt-writer cycle (docs/phase-2/ontogrammatic-systems.md §16 — orientation, not authorization): deterministic code composes the place and the expectation, inference processes the experience, and the story returns through a pen that cannot emit a non-story. Terms minted here provisionally, owed to the glyph-knolling grip ritual before any code claims them: 'morphic agent' (bdo's coinage — pin: an agent whose program is the surface it stands in and whose mind is a pluggable admitted backing; non-example: a long-lived assistant carrying a fixed personality between places — that is a staffed process, not a morphic one) and 'experience' (pin: a launched, bounded encounter — one ambient event composed with one place and one granted expectation, handed to one summoned agent, terminating in an authored story plus receipts; non-example: an ambient briefing line — context injected without obligation is weather, not an experience).
epic.value: You stop being the system's only author and only refuser. Ambient events become launched experiences; morphic agents process them and propose their own stories; real gates — deterministic where the question is law, inference where it is judgment — refuse what does not fit before it reaches you; and every new capability an agent gains toward touching ontum is an admitted rung you stamped, with receipts, never a claim you have to take on faith.
epic.horizon: One experience processed end to end: an ambient event launches an experience into a registered surface; a morphic agent blinks in under a branded spawn with an admitted backing and an explicit trust rung; deterministic code grants it the context and the expectation; it processes the experience and authors its own story about it — first person, the five movements, through a pen that cannot emit a non-story — and that story survives the Reader and a gate set with no fixed-verdict mock left, all five gates enumerated on the record, each with at least one refusal in its history, to your stamp. The ambient hook's mock temperature reads 0/5. Ontum-touch remains a defined, locked rung that only you can admit.

pieces.status: held by epic.envoy-reception (done-line 0020, in flight on a sibling session)
pieces.glue: trust begins at refusal: the first machine 'no' on a real artifact. Named so the arc reads whole, not to double-build — the proof case already exists (a sealed package carrying a verifiable overclaim: the 'previous outside reflection' line in arc-mirror-gpt's briefing, which the records attribute to an internal session). The waves below assume the refusal precedent lands there; if it stalls, wave 1's deterministic refusal becomes the precedent instead.

pieces.status: wave 1 — authored and seeded by the witness session, 2026-06-10: the flip demonstrated in the asking
pieces.glue: the five movements (from, framing, work, need, value) ratified as the Pattern Commons — a commons proper: one governed, versioned definition with a home every speaking surface inherits, amended only on the record, tended by the Reader's grading so it cannot rot into habit; not a pattern that happens to be common. The experience story is added as every session's closing act: the mortal process that lived the run tells it, first person, before dissolving. The Reader (story-gate.claude.v1, verdicts conform|route_back — held by claude/story-node, pull request 18, CONFLICTING at amendment time) stands between every story and the owner, so a first edition never reaches him. This atom is itself the first experience story, authored by the session whose experience it tells; D-2 holds by the author judging it at no gate.

pieces.status: wave 1 — the deterministic route, proven where the damage is live
pieces.glue: L1 placement de-mocked as deterministic code on the records layer: ids folded over all refs (origin/*, sibling worktrees), so two records claiming one address refuse to fit — and the colliding 0020 done-lines on four branches (now five with pull request 18's) are the living §10 case it must catch (a check that would not have caught them is not done). First de-mocked gate whose judge is law, not inference: the 'deterministic code route' of bdo's directive, the cheapest proof that a judging node can refuse, and the repair of the fleet-scale crack in the pen's id-from-local-fold discipline.

pieces.status: wave 1 — the frame every spawn hangs on
pieces.glue: capability rungs as admitted records (I-8): what each agent class — summoned session, branded subagent, local model, external mind, deterministic rule — may read, judge, author, and touch. Each rung is a typed admission signed --by bdo; pens and the spawn rail enforce the rung at act time; no agent grants itself a rung (D-4: nothing signs its own approval). The top rung, ontum-touch (authoring or mutating fabric units), is defined here and LOCKED: no admission exists until bdo writes one, and bdo's trust boundary from this directive is quoted verbatim in the rung's record. Trust accrues as receipts against rungs, not as assertions in prose.

the loop fills its own nodes: wrap the Agent spawn so a subagent arrives as a branded, prompt-pinned, rung-checked, receipted virtual node, and deny raw Agent calls (the command-guard / PR-pen pattern — the watcher's report decides the deny list). Prove it on the existing value-gate.claude.v1 before any new node rides it (one new thing at a time). This is the Claude-instance inference route: a CC session as a mortal process whose summons, prompt hash, rung, and verdict are all on the record.

pluggable judging minds as admitted records, sibling of atom.surface-registry.v0: local models the privileged default (zero disclosure), external families the deliberate, receipted exception riding the envoy ledger. Provenance grows a which-mind axis and no-self-signing runs on it (a mind cannot judge its own writer's output, even across an API); credentials are referenced, never stored in an admitted record. This is the local-model inference route — the second set of eyes becomes cross-family instead of same-family.

pieces.status: wave 3 — the unit, gripped before built
pieces.glue: the typed experience record: source event (which ambient beat fired — open summons, nonzero drift, mock temperature, a records collision, a dropped source), surface (registered and admitted, the surface-registry pattern), composed context (the place, assembled deterministically per D-9), granted expectation (what story-or-verdict shape must return, with its terminal set — the deterministic grant of bdo's 'inference and expectation'), and summoned backing (rung-checked against the ladder). Carries this epic's pin and non-example through the knolling ritual before code lands. An experience that obligates nothing is refused at birth — context without obligation is weather, and weather is what the ambient hook already provides.

ambient events become launched experiences: a level-triggered fold over the log's existing beats proposes experiences into registered surfaces, and a pen applies them one receipted act at a time (the reflect pattern: the fold decides, the pen acts, a re-run is a no-op, a half-applied launch resumes). No daemon, no broker, no edge-triggered queue (hard rule — an edge can drop what a level re-derives); the hooks stay read-only and the launcher runs on the loop's beats. The launcher is where 'from ambient events launch experiences into specific surfaces' becomes mechanism instead of sentence.

de-mock the oldest mock on the log: value-loop.story-author.mock.v0 has authored every event chain since the skeleton. The morphic agent ends its experience by authoring its own story about what it processed — through a story pen that is incapable of emitting a non-story (bdo's pen rule: minimal data for a cold reader, value before mechanism) — and the story enters the pipeline as a proposed atom: gap-to-atom, gated. Self-extension proposes, the owner admits (D-4) — this is the join language/pragmatics.md holds open (the substrate's needs-you joined to the Machine's needs-instrumentation), built on the substrate, and the first sensor of experience-shaped meaning (report 0004 §3).

the remaining fixed-verdict mocks (handoff-gate, value-confirm; placement lands in wave 1) are de-mocked under admitted, rung-checked backings — inference or deterministic per the question each gate actually asks — and 'the five gates' is enumerated once, on the record, ending the two incompatible counts (PIPELINE's five stages vs the stamp receipt's 'L1, L2, eval, the L0 second check'). Done when the ambient hook's mock temperature reads 0/5 and every gate has at least one non-accept verdict in its history — a gate that has never refused is a mock with a bigger bill (report 0004).
